title: Saw a cake design online. We'll build it — 100% eggless — in Harris Park.
summary:
Most custom bakeries near Merrylands will take a photo reference. Most of them also use eggs. That's the complication.

Send us the design. We'll build it — buttercream, fondant, or ganache — in any of our 15 flavours. No egg in the sponge, not in the buttercream, not anywhere. That's not the exception. That's every order since 2019.

48-hour notice minimum. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park — less than 10 minutes from Westmead or Merrylands. Open daily until 10pm.

WhatsApp the reference: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom eggless cake from photo reference
found cake design online can't get it eggless near Merrylands
